Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Meticulous attention to detail for every type of professional and residential space.
Services.officeDesc: Professional workspace maintenance to the highest standards.

Services.bathroomDesc: Thorough post-construction or end-of-lease cleaning, fully turnkey.
Services.sofaDesc: Preparation and restoration of spaces before and after your events.
Services.homeSubtitle: Discover our cleaning services tailored to your needs. We operate in Geneva with professionalism, discretion and confidentiality.
Services.appartements_desc: We offer a complete and thorough service for maintaining your apartments and homes. Each visit is carried out with care, to ensure a clean, healthy and perfectly maintained interior, adapted to your lifestyle.
Services.bureaux_desc: We provide regular cleaning of your professional spaces with discretion and efficiency. Our goal is to maintain a clean, pleasant working environment conducive to the well-being of your staff.
Services.bail_desc: We carry out a thorough deep clean that meets the requirements of property inspections. Every detail is taken into account to guarantee an impeccable home, ready to be handed back without worry.
Services.evenements_desc: After your events, we step in quickly to restore the space to perfect condition. Our service ensures a clean and tidy space, with no hassle for you.
Services.vitres_desc: We provide meticulous cleaning of glazed surfaces to achieve a streak-free result. This service optimises the light in your space and enhances your interior.
Services.conciergerie_desc: We offer a complete service for the management and maintenance of your properties, in collaboration with private individuals and property agencies. Each intervention is carried out with rigour, discretion and a high standard of quality.

Reviews.title: More than
Reviews.titleEnd: verified reviews from happy clients in Geneva and Switzerland
Reviews.review1Text: 100% recommend Wendy. She and her team do outstanding work at a very high level with exceptional attention to detail. I also love the very clear communication around tasks, time and fees, and knowing I can completely let go of all aspects of cleaning.
Reviews.review2Text: I have used Wen's Cleaning Services on several occasions and couldn't be more satisfied. The team is professional, punctual and extremely thorough. Every visit leaves my home spotless, with attention to detail that makes all the difference. I highly recommend their services.
Reviews.review3Text: I wanted to write to you to thank you warmly. You really saved me today. She worked very hard and very methodically cleaning everything. I am very happy, she is a very kind and hardworking girl. Thank you again.
Reviews.review4Text: It was the first time Lili came alone and I was satisfied when I got home. I won't hesitate to reach out again if needed. Many thanks and I wish you an excellent day.
Reviews.review5Text: You are so lovely and have created such a lovely business with lovely people. You deserve every success in the world.
Reviews.review6Text: Excellent cleaning company. Clean and meticulous work.
Reviews.review7Text: Thank you Wendy xxx Wonderful service as always thank you xxx
Reviews.review8Text: Hi Wendy, I just got back from Zurich and the house looks lovely, thank you very much. 🙏🏻
Reviews.review9Text: 100% recommend Wen's Cleaning. She and her team do outstanding work at very high level with exceptional attention to detail. I also love the very clear communication around tasks / time / fees and knowing I can completely (mentally and physically) let go of all aspects of cleaning (very hard for me to do!).

WhyChoose.title: Why Choose Our Exceptional Cleaning Services?
WhyChoose.feature1Desc: Our professionals are trained, verified and committed to delivering consistent, high-quality service. We guarantee serious follow-up and transparent communication at every visit.
WhyChoose.feature2Desc: Every space is cleaned with care, from living areas to the most demanding zones like the bathroom. No detail is left to chance.
WhyChoose.feature3Desc: We value integration and trust, offering professional opportunities and a service based on respect and closeness.

Founder.name: Wendy Larco
Founder.bio: Wendy Larco founded Wen's Cleaning Services with a clear vision: to deliver professional cleaning excellence in Geneva. A graduate of the SINGA Switzerland programme, her entrepreneurial journey has been recognised and rewarded for her commitment to quality and professional integration.
Founder.achievement1Desc: Winner of the SINGA entrepreneurship award in Meyrin, Geneva — a recognition of excellence, an innovative human-centred approach and professional integration.
Founder.newBio: Wendy Larco is the Founder - Director of Wen's Cleaning Service, a company born from a clear vision: to offer a quality cleaning service founded on trust, professionalism and respect. Driven by human values and a true entrepreneurial spirit, she built her company with passion, perseverance and commitment. Her goal is to bring much more than a service: to offer a reliable, attentive and personalised experience for each client. Through Wens Cleaning Service, she aims to provide a service that goes beyond cleaning, contributing to the daily well-being of her clients and building a lasting relationship of trust.
Founder.awardText: On 19 November 2025, at the SINGA Switzerland event held at the Fédération des Entreprises Romandes, Wendy Clean Service was awarded the Local Impact Prize as part of SINGA Stories Geneva. This recognition is a testament to Wendy's and her team's commitment to the Geneva community and professional excellence.

Features.title: Why Choose Wen's?
Features.feature1Desc: Your property is fully protected with our comprehensive insurance coverage.
Features.feature2Desc: Rigorously vetted and trained staff delivering consistent quality.
Features.feature3Desc: Non-toxic, pet-safe products that are gentle on your home and the environment.

discover.title: Discover Wen's!
discover.text: Your go-to cleaning service in Geneva. Professional staff, personalised services tailored to your needs, commitment to punctuality. We take care of it, you enjoy it.

hero.h1: Count on Wen's, your cleaning team in Geneva!
hero.title: Welcome to Wen's Cleaning Services!
hero.body:
Choose our professional cleaning expertise. From homes to offices, our complete range includes special services such as event cleaning, end-of-lease, post-construction, and concierge services.

We stand out through our professionalism and punctuality. Discover why Wen's Cleaning Services shines through its professionalism and delights through the quality of its services.

Contact us now and see the difference!

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.callout: Are you looking for a reliable, efficient, and eco-friendly cleaning company?
commitment.answer: We guarantee quality service, tailored to your needs and budget. Contact us today for a free, personalised quote. Wen's, your trusted partner for impeccable cleaning.

team.title: Our Expert Cleaning Team in Geneva
team.intro: At WEN'S Cleaning, we know that the quality of a cleaning service depends above all on the team delivering it. That's why we provide qualified cleaning professionals in Geneva and throughout Switzerland, rigorously selected for their seriousness, punctuality, and integrity.
team.bullet1: A trained and experienced cleaning team, capable of working in offices, buildings, shops, and private residences.
team.bullet2: Verified employees, with checked files and references for your peace of mind.
team.bullet3: Certified professional cleaning experts, following our company's quality standards.
team.bullet4: Reliability, discretion, and trust: values that allow us to build lasting relationships with our clients.

hero.h2: At Wen's, cleaning is a labour of love!

services.houseDesc: Regular cleaning, carpet, rug, window and blind maintenance.
services.deepDesc: We tackle hidden dirt in carpets, furniture and fixtures.
services.extraDesc: Ironing, window cleaning, space organisation (wardrobes, garages)
services.movingDesc: We clean new spaces and prepare previous ones.

cta.h2: Entrust us with the expert cleaning of your home
cta.body: Let us take charge of the professional cleaning of your home. Hand over your household tasks and enjoy a clean, refreshed space. Make your home shine with our expert cleaning services.

services.endOfLeaseTitle: End of Construction / End of Lease
services.eventsDesc: Cleaning of spaces before and after an event.

cta.body: Discover our commercial cleaning services for an impeccable work environment. Our experienced team ensures regular cleaning of offices, common areas and glazed surfaces, as well as specialised treatment of carpets and floors. Enjoy an optimal professional environment.

offices.label: Office Cleaning
offices.body: Optimise the image and atmosphere of your business with our office cleaning service. We guarantee an impeccable, professional environment so you can focus on what matters most: growing your business.
offices.ctaLabel: Contact us for a personalised quote
offices.ctaBody: Discover how we can help you maintain your workspace in optimal condition.

endofwork.label: End of Construction / End of Lease
endofwork.constructionH3: Complete your project with total peace of mind
endofwork.constructionBody: Our specialist team will leave your property immaculate, ready for the next step. Trust us to provide a fast, efficient and professional service.
endofwork.leaseBody: A thorough end-of-tenancy clean helps ensure the security deposit is returned and maintains good relations with the landlord or letting agency.
endofwork.ctaBody: With this cleaning service, you will leave your space entirely clean and ready to be used or handed back to the owner.

concierge.label: Concierge Service
concierge.body: Our qualified team is here to take care of all aspects of daily management, offering you exceptional service at every step.
concierge.ctaBody: Wen's offers its concierge service to keep your building clean and in order.

events.label: Event Cleaning
events.body: Our experienced team ensures every corner is impeccable, leaving your guests a lasting impression of cleanliness and freshness. From pre- and post-event cleaning to waste management, we handle everything so you can focus on what matters: enjoying the moment.
events.ctaBody: Event cleaning is essential to guarantee the success and comfort of attendees at any event — whether a conference, wedding, party or other special reception.

moving.label: Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning
moving.h3: Free yourself from the hassles of moving.
moving.body: We handle everything, from deep cleaning your previous home to refreshing your new space. Let our experienced team make your transition stress-free and worry-free.
moving.checklist1: All areas of the home cleaned
moving.ctaBody: Move-in cleaning is carried out to ensure that the new residence is clean, fresh and ready to be occupied by its new inhabitants.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our cleaning services.
faq.q1: How long does it take to clean the whole house?
faq.a1: Every space is unique, which is why cleaning time may vary. We carry out an initial visit to assess your needs and offer you a personalised quote.
faq.q2: Do you bring your own products, or should I provide mine?
faq.a2: We bring our own professional cleaning products and equipment. If you prefer that we use yours, that is also possible.
faq.q3: Can you also clean windows, the oven, the fridge, or blinds?
faq.a3: Yes, we offer additional services such as cleaning windows, the oven, the fridge and blinds. Simply mention it when booking.
faq.q4: Can you always come on the same day and at the same time?
faq.a4: Of course. We can schedule a regular cleaning on the day and at the time that suits you best.
faq.q5: Do you clean outside areas as well, or only indoors?
faq.a5: We mainly handle indoor cleaning, but we can also take care of the exterior on request (balconies, terraces, etc.).
faq.q6: What happens if I can't be home one day?
faq.a6: No problem. We can agree in advance on a way to access your home, or reschedule the appointment to another date.
faq.q7: Do you work alone or as a team?
faq.a7: Wens Cleaning Service started as a personal project and, thanks to our clients' trust, we are now a dedicated team committed to providing professional cleaning with a personal touch. We believe every detail matters, which is why every service is carried out with dedication, responsibility and passion.
faq.q8: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a8: Payment is made by bank transfer, TWINT or cash, after each service. For regular clients, we offer monthly invoicing.

WhyWens.title: Why Choose WEN'S Cleaning Services?
WhyWens.subtitle: Our four pillars to guarantee you an impeccable service.
WhyWens.card1Desc: A high level of professionalism where every corner is treated with care.
WhyWens.card2Desc: Absolute respect for your space and your privacy in everything we do.
WhyWens.card3Desc: Solutions precisely adapted to the unique needs of each client.
WhyWens.card4Desc: Consistent quality delivered with punctuality and professionalism.
WhyWens.closingQuote: Excellence reveals itself in every detail.
WhyWens.sideText1: At Wen's Cleaning Services, we believe that a truly clean space leaves nothing to chance. Every surface, every nook and cranny, and every detail is treated with the utmost rigour and meticulous care.
WhyWens.sideText2: This commitment guides each of our interventions and reflects our dedication to impeccable quality.
WhyWens.sideText3: From the initial contact to the final inspection, our priority is simple: your complete satisfaction.
WhyWens.sideText4: Because a spotless environment is more than just appearance — it brings serenity, comfort and well-being to your everyday life.

CleaningProducts.title: Our Cleaning Products & Methods
CleaningProducts.paragraph1: At Wen's Cleaning Services, every detail matters. We carefully select our products to guarantee impeccable results, without compromising health or the environment.
CleaningProducts.paragraph2intro: We work in two ways, depending on each client's preference:
CleaningProducts.bullet1: with traditional professional products, which are highly effective

CleaningProducts.paragraph3: Our goal is to offer you effective, safe cleaning that is adapted to every need.
